Interface IMosaicDataset2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a mosaic dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("63C4A7C3-A7DD-46A8-9E12-5ED568517FAC")]
public interface IMosaicDataset2 : IMosaicDataset

The associated analysis results table.

ITable AnalysisResults { get; set; }

Methods

ApplyFunction(IRasterFunction, object, string) 

void ApplyFunction(IRasterFunction pFunction, object pArguments, string Name)

Parameters

pFunction IRasterFunction
pArguments object
Name string

ClearFunction() 

void ClearFunction()

ComputeCellSizes(out double, out double)

Computes the smallest low cell size and the largest high cell size values from items in the mosaic catalog. The values returned are in the same units as the spatial references of the catalog.

void ComputeCellSizes(out double pLowCellSize, out double pHighCellSize)

Parameters

pLowCellSize double
pHighCellSize double
